steps.t: You have left Bâr Húrin with Duilin and Derufin to hunt one of the mighty Mûmakil.
Duilin and Derufin are waiting for you to choose which of the brothers you wish to accompany on the hunt for a Mûmak.
You have made your way through the wilds of Ithilien in search of Mûmakil, and now the brothers Duilin and Derufin have once more crossed paths in the…
